name: pawbook-langgraph-mcp
description: PawBook — LangGraph + LangChain + MCP + Gemini Free

scripts.start: concurrently --names "AVAIL,PRICE,BOOK,NOTIF,AGENT" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,green,magenta,blueBright" "node mcp-servers/availability-server.js" "node mcp-servers/pricing-server.js" "node mcp-servers/booking-server.js" "node mcp-servers/notification-server.js" "node agent/agent-server.js"
